---
layout: cv
title: Isaac Newtons's CV
---
# Isaac Newton
Physicist, Mathematician, Cambridge professor.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="zehao997@gmail.com">zehao997@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/Liam-Li-27/Zehao_Li.github.io">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="Zehao_Resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Standing on the shoulders of giants

### Specialized in
Data Cleansing, Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), Statistical Modeling, Automated Data Pipelines.


## Research interests
Data Mining, Statistical Computing, Predictive Analytics, Exploratory Data Analysis.


## Education

`2025-2029`
__The Brigham Young University__



### Patents

`2012`
Infinitesimal calculus for solutions to physics problems, [SMBC](http://www.techdirt.com/articles/20121011/09312820678/if-patents-had-been-around-time-newton.shtml) patent 001


## Occupation

`2025 Apirl - 2026 January`
Chinese class TA, Rexburg


`2030`
MIT



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
